title: Four Image Series Featuring Sweaty Woman Exercising
sourceTitle: Four Image Series Featuring Sweaty Woman Exercising
prompt: A four-image series featuring a sweaty woman exercising in a modern gym with large floor-to-ceiling windows, wearing a matching mauve athletic tank top and leggings with white sneakers. The images depict her executing a diverse full-body workout routine: performing a single-arm cable pulldown while standing, a bodyweight forward lunge, a single-arm dumbbell row with one knee resting on a fitness bench, and a dynamic high-knee running motion utilizing a low-anchored resistance band around her ankle on a green turf area.
originalPrompt: A four-image series featuring a sweaty woman exercising in a modern gym with large floor-to-ceiling windows, wearing a matching mauve athletic tank top and leggings with white sneakers. The images depict her executing a diverse full-body workout routine: performing a single-arm cable pulldown while standing, a bodyweight forward lunge, a single-arm dumbbell row with one knee resting on a fitness bench, and a dynamic high-knee running motion utilizing a low-anchored resistance band around her ankle on a green turf area.
